connect.contactflow.Content.Description: The content of the contact flow.

connect.contactflow.Description.Description: The description of the contact flow.

connect.contactflow.InstanceArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Connect instance.

connect.contactflow.Name.Description: The name of the contact flow.

connect.contactflow.State.Description: The state of the contact flow.

connect.contactflow.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

connect.contactflow.Type.Description: The type of the contact flow. For descriptions of the available types, see [Choose a Contact Flow Type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/connect/latest/adminguide/create-contact-flow.html#contact-flow-types) in the *Amazon Connect Administrator Guide*.
